steps.name: the user is on the login page
the user enters valid email and password
the user should be redirected to the dashboard page
the page header should display Logo Hadir
the user navigates to the Laporan menu
the user selects the Cuti submenu
the user enters name "Aditya" in the search field
the user scrolls the table to the right to find Action button
clicks the action button on the first row
clicks the cancel cuti action with reason "Tidak jadi cuti"
